content.text: Let me debug the issue with example 8.2:

input.description: Test example 8.2 again with exit code

input.command:
python -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '.')
from cfgpipe import parse_cli_args

# Test with -threshold=1.25
result = parse_cli_args(['-threshold=1.25'])
print('-threshold=1.25:', result)

# Test with --threshold=1.25
result2 = parse_cli_args(['--threshold=1.25'])
print('--threshold=1.25:', result2)
"
rm -f /tmp/threshold.txt && echo "0.9" > /tmp/threshold.txt && THRESHOLD=0.75 python cfgpipe.py schema2.json -threshold=1.25
